src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Servlet container expects jakarta.servlet.error.* keys in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+; using javax keys results in missing attributes at runtime.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if extended.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Spring Security 6 requires security configuration to be defined via @Bean SecurityFilterChain methods; the old @Override method signature is no longer valid.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.before:
@Override
	protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.after:
@Bean
	protected SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based authorizeHttpRequests and requestMatchers.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The old authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() methods are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(WebSecurity) method with a WebSecurityCustomizer bean or equivalent logic.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method in WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; ignoring requests must be handled differently (often via WebSecurityCustomizer or within the filter chain if applicable, though here it seems removed or handled implicitly, but the specific removal of the override is the breaking change).

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update AuthenticationManager bean definition to use AuthenticationConfiguration.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The super.authenticationManagerBean() method is no longer available when not extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; AuthenticationConfiguration is the new standard way to obtain the manager.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Remove the deprecated configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: AuthenticationManagerBuilder is no longer used in the new functional security configuration style; this method is removed from the base class.
